title: Fancy Potion Particles!
body:
# About:
**If you got tired of old potion particles - here is brand new resourcepack to help you!
This resourcepack changes usual particles of potions to fancier one's! These new particles will be nice alternative to boring old spirals ^_^**

![Smile face with new particles! :)](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/badf33748ee61586f8af729b25d613ce851473aa.png)
